stemHtml: In a remote reading compass, what is the function of the Selsyn unit?

options.a: To compute directional information using input from the flux valve and the directional gyroscope.
options.b: To transmit directional signals to the gyro and amplifier.
options.c: To provide torque feedback to control the position of a display needle.
options.d: To compute navigation data by interpreting flux and torque inputs.
